'''yowasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgely|judgely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgely|judgely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yowasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowasithi|yowasithi]] || [[word:yowasiji|yowasiji]] || [[word:yowasishi|yowasishi]] || [[word:yowasiki|yowasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowasuthuthu|yowasuthuthu]] || [[word:yowasujuju|yowasujuju]] || [[word:yowasushushu|yowasushushu]] || [[word:yowasukuku|yowasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowasuthu|yowasuthu]] || [[word:yowasuju|yowasuju]] || [[word:yowasushu|yowasushu]] || [[word:yowasuku|yowasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowasufthuf|yowasufthuf]] || [[word:yowasufjuf|yowasufjuf]] || [[word:yowasufshuf|yowasufshuf]] || [[word:yowasufkuf|yowasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowasethe|yowasethe]] || [[word:yowaseje|yowaseje]] || [[word:yowaseshe|yowaseshe]] || [[word:yowaseke|yowaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowasothotho|yowasothotho]] || [[word:yowasojojo|yowasojojo]] || [[word:yowasoshosho|yowasoshosho]] || [[word:yowasokoko|yowasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowasotho|yowasotho]] || [[word:yowasojo|yowasojo]] || [[word:yowasosho|yowasosho]] || [[word:yowasoko|yowasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowasofthof|yowasofthof]] || [[word:yowasofjof|yowasofjof]] || [[word:yowasofshof|yowasofshof]] || [[word:yowasofkof|yowasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfthÃŸf|yowasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfjÃŸf|yowasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfshÃŸf|yowasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfkÃŸf|yowasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yowasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yowasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yowasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yowasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfthÃŸf|yowasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfjÃŸf|yowasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfshÃŸf|yowasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfkÃŸf|yowasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfthÃŸf|yowasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfjÃŸf|yowasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfshÃŸf|yowasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowasÃŸfkÃŸf|yowasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowasÃḊthÃḊ|yowasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yowasÃḊjÃḊ|yowasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yowasÃḊshÃḊ|yowasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yowasÃḊkÃḊ|yowasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowasathatha|yowasathatha]] || [[word:yowasajaja|yowasajaja]] || [[word:yowasashasha|yowasashasha]] || [[word:yowasakaka|yowasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowasatha|yowasatha]] || [[word:yowasaja|yowasaja]] || [[word:yowasasha|yowasasha]] || [[word:yowasaka|yowasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowasafthaf|yowasafthaf]] || [[word:yowasafjaf|yowasafjaf]] || [[word:yowasafshaf|yowasafshaf]] || [[word:yowasafkaf|yowasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yowasasha|yowasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowashÃḋsha|yowashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowasrosha|yowasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowasmusha|yowasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowasyasha|yowasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowasnkshÃḋsha|goyowasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowasnkrosha|goyowasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowasnkmusha|goyowasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowasnkyasha|goyowasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yowawasasha|yowawasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowawashÃḋsha|yowawashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowawasrosha|yowawasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowawasmusha|yowawasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowawasyasha|yowawasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowawasnkshÃḋsha|goyowawasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowawasnkrosha|goyowawasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowawasnkmusha|goyowawasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowawasnkyasha|goyowawasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yewÃḊsasha|yewÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yewÃḊshÃḋsha|yewÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yewÃḊsrosha|yewÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yewÃḊsmusha|yewÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yewÃḊsyasha|yewÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyewÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|goyewÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyewÃḊsnkrosha|goyewÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyewÃḊsnkmusha|goyewÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyewÃḊsnkyasha|goyewÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yowfasasha|yowfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowfashÃḋsha|yowfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowfasrosha|yowfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowfasmusha|yowfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowfasyasha|yowfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowfasnkshÃḋsha|goyowfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowfasnkrosha|goyowfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowfasnkmusha|goyowfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowfasnkyasha|goyowfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
